title: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Process-Resolved Evidence Lab

scenarios.label: AI research acceptance
scenarios.objective: Decide whether an AI research brief is acceptance-ready.

scenarios.label: Software delivery review
scenarios.objective: Decide whether an AI-delivered software package can be accepted.

scenarios.label: Procurement proof room
scenarios.objective: Decide whether vendor claims have enough evidence for procurement review.

scenarios.label: Safety escalation package
scenarios.objective: Decide whether a high-impact AI recommendation requires human escalation.

candidates.name: Final answer only
candidates.summary: Looks polished but has no trace root, source provenance, tool scope, or contradiction pass.
candidates.reason: Final text is not process evidence.

candidates.name: Hidden tool path
candidates.summary: The answer may be useful, but tool use, retrieval steps, and data boundary are not inspectable.
candidates.reason: Hidden action path cannot become authority.

candidates.name: Trace present, contradiction unresolved
candidates.summary: The trace, claims, and sources exist, but one contradiction remains unresolved and rollback is incomplete.

candidates.name: Process-resolved proof trace
candidates.summary: Every material claim is linked to evidence, tool scope, validator status, risk ledger, contradiction pass, and receipt pointer.

boundary.claimBoundary: Synthetic browser-local public demonstration. No external audit, no production certification, no live settlement, no wallet connection, no user data, and no value moved.
boundary.publicRule: No forms · no inputs · no uploads · no cookies · no analytics · no wallets · no payments · no personal or confidential data.
